docs: document all split methods, fix data_loader device detection order

- EVALUATION_PROTOCOL.md (EN + KO): replace single-LOO table with full
  description of all four split methods: loo, temporal_ratio/temporal,
  random, presplit. Clarify that rating_threshold and min_interactions

and login redirect param support. API key auth unchanged as fallback.

commit.message:
fix: improve diagnostics, output reliability, and risk docs for peer-review

Cherry-picked from a self-review (/peer-review on SKILL.md itself):

1. Stderr capture: Replace 2>/dev/null with temp file capture so CLI
   failures (auth errors, rate limits) show diagnostic output instead
   of silent "exit code 1" messages.

2. Version/auth preflight: Add --version smoke checks after command -v
   to catch OAuth/auth issues before parallel dispatch hangs.

3. Numbered output: Append "Number each finding sequentially" to all
   20 multi-round mode prompts (10 modes x 2 models) so the cherry-pick
   UX ("keep 1, 3, 5") works reliably.

4. Accepted Risks: Document the argv prompt exposure limitation with
   mitigations and future fix path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: block crawlers from filtered/paginated directory URLs

DDG and other crawlers were hitting /pain-management/*/? with filter
params (specialty, page, etc.) at 23 req/sec, each bypassing ISR cache
and triggering fresh DB queries. Now returns 404 for any crawler
hitting directory pages with query parameters. Clean canonical URLs
remain crawlable for indexing.

commit.message:
feat: nixnet v1 engine — identity persistence proven on Proxmox

WHAT: Complete CLI skeleton for host identity and continuity framework.
Enrollment, convergent apply, layered config (global/role/host),
lifecycle state machine, doctor health checks, reclaim safety.

PROVEN: Fresh enroll, idempotent apply, dormant transition, identity
persistence after VM destruction, clean reclaim with claim history,
doctor 9/9 on both fresh and reclaimed machines. Two Proxmox VMs
(Ubuntu 24.04) tested and destroyed 2026-03-08.

ARCHITECTURE: Public engine (this repo) + private world (nixnet-world).
Engine locates world via NIXNET_WORLD env var. Local runtime at
~/.local/nixnet/. Pure bash, yq for YAML, no external frameworks.

TAGS: nixnet, identity, enrollment, lifecycle, reclaim, convergent-apply,
layered-config, proxmox, proof, milestone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: nixnet
repository.description: Git-backed host identity and continuity framework for Ubuntu Linux ecosystems

- Dark mode Awwwards-style design with GSAP animations
- Lenis smooth scrolling, scroll-driven SVG lines
- Homepage sections: Hero, Why AI-First, About, Services, Target Audience, Video, CTA
- Brand fonts (Satoshi, Inter) and brand colors (purple/red/orange)
- Responsive navbar with mobile overlay, footer
- 3D tilt cards, floating particles, mouse-reactive orbs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Helius holder quality & deep intelligence for OnChain Agent

Add Helius API integration for holder analysis with two layers:
- Holder Quality: top 10 concentration, whale count, distribution breakdown
- Holder Intelligence: sniper detection, wallet age analysis, connected
  wallet detection, dev wallet tracking

Uses DAS RPC (getTokenAccounts) for holder data and Enhanced Transactions
API for wallet history. Includes rate-limit handling with retry/backoff,
in-memory transaction cache, and batched concurrent requests.

Frontend displays Holder Quality and Holder Intelligence blocks in
On-Chain Metrics with risk badges, distribution bars, sniper details,
and wallet age breakdowns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use absolute URLs in middleware redirects to prevent malformed URL errors

Requests with missing/malformed host headers caused nextUrl.clone() to
produce relative URLs, triggering "URL is malformed" errors. Now uses
explicit origin fallback to https://painclinics.com.

Add frequency analysis, metrics tracking, and experiment configs

- blind_deblurring.py: add PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS metrics, latent normality tests (K-S, Shapiro-Wilk), and frequency band energy fraction analysis (low/mid/high) with 2D FFT spectrum visualization

- analyze_normality.py: standalone normality analysis script with Q-Q plots
- requirements.txt: pinned dependency versions for reproducibility
- .gitignore: exclude checkpoints, __pycache__, and large result folders
- results/: add experiment metrics CSVs (step10, step20, freq variants)

commit.message:
fix: Agent 会话重命名时附加目录丢失 (#96)

修复 Agent 模式下重命名会话时，附加的文件夹（attachedDirectories）会丢失的问题。

问题原因：
- 前端在处理重命名时，手动构造了只包含 title 和 updatedAt 的对象
- 导致后端返回的完整 AgentSessionMeta 对象中的其他字段（如 attachedDirectories）被丢弃

修复方案：
- 使用后端返回的完整 AgentSessionMeta 对象更新状态
- 与 Chat 模式的重命名逻辑保持一致

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(game): replace Gravity Pulse with Getaway: Night Heist (cops & robbers stealth)

Complete redesign from simple one-touch arcade to top-down stealth chase game.
Player is a thief evading police vision cones, collecting loot, and escaping.

Key changes:
- 4-state police AI (patrol/alert/chase/search) with vision cones
- BSP procedural map generation with rooms, corridors, hide spots
- Virtual joystick movement, camera tracking, minimap
- Level progression with scaling difficulty and backup timer
- Score system with time bonus and stealth bonus

Addresses feedback: "기획이 너무 단순하다" → multi-layer tactical depth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: UltraGCN GPU topk, LightGCN propagation strategy pre-resolved at init

UltraGCN:
- Move G_dense to device before torch.topk so TopK runs on GPU/MPS instead of CPU
- Remove redundant [UltraGCN] prefix from _log() calls (already prefixed by base class)

LightGCN:
- Pre-resolve sparse/device propagation strategy in __init__ (_sparse_prop, _adj_device)
- Remove register_buffer() call from inside _propagate_embeddings() forward pass (was
  mutating model state during inference — wrong pattern)
- Remove per-layer device mismatch check and try/except from the propagation loop
- MPS + sparse: matrix moved to CPU at init, results moved back after each sparse mm
- Simplify _get_normalized_adj_matrix(): inline the values computation, remove OOM re-raise
- Remove Korean change-log comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Release v4.6.3: Feature-by-Feature Logic Audit — Six Verified Bugs Fixed

- Bug 1: Post-sigmoid boost clipping creates ceiling effect — switched goal/entity boosts from additive to multiplicative to preserve relative ranking at top of results
- Bug 2: Score breakdown formatter omits context & priming components — added formatting for context(X) and priming(X) to detailed output
- Bug 3: NLI neutral fallthrough in conflict detection — NLI results with neutral label and low contradiction now correctly skip conflict reporting
- Bug 4: Unicode misclassification in token estimation — only count ASCII punctuation as non-alpha, treating non-ASCII (accented, CJK, emoji) as letters
- Bug 5: Browse mode hardcoded to insights weights — now averages effective weights across all 4 active categories
- Bug 6: Explicit feedback accumulation unbounded — added EXPLICIT_FEEDBACK_COMPONENT_CAP=10.0 to clamp per-component sums

All 2196 tests passing. Updated 2 existing tests to reflect corrected NLI neutral behavior. Added 12 new test cases for fixes.

commit.message:
Add emcee autocorrelation convergence check for early stopping

Unify the emcee run loop to check both deadline and autocorrelation
time, stopping early when all chains exceed mcmc_convergence_factor × tau.
Also update mcmc_total_steps to reflect actual chain length post-run.

commit.message:
fix: audit fixes — security, bugs, architecture, performance

Security:
- CORS AllowedOrigins reads from ALLOWED_ORIGIN env var (hardcoded localhost removed)
- Email format validation on registration
- Refresh endpoint no longer leaks internal error details
- Google OAuth upsert only links accounts when google_id is NULL
- JWT parser uses WithExpirationRequired()
- Mailer no-op log no longer prints invite token
- Frontend API base URL reads from VITE_API_BASE_URL env var

Bugs:
- AcceptInviteAtomic re-checks expiry atomically inside the tx (TOCTOU fix)
- AcceptInviteAtomic catches unique constraint violation → ErrAlreadyMember
- AcceptInvitePage useRef guard prevents double-POST in React StrictMode
- playbookStore fetchPlays/fetchPlay use Promise.all + clear stale state
- PlaybookPage/PlayEditorPage hydrate currentTeam on direct URL navigation

Architecture:
- Mailer depends on Sender interface, not concrete *Mailer
- Shared requireMember/requireCoach helpers in usecase/helpers.go
- Single writeUsecaseError replaces four duplicated handler error mappers
- Role/status magic strings replaced with constants in models/constants.go
- Sentinel errors: ErrInvalidCredentials, ErrNameRequired, ErrAlreadyMember
- Removed dead code: AddMember, RefreshTokenExpiresAt, UpdateInviteStatus

Performance:
- DB connection pool: MaxOpenConns(25), MaxIdleConns(10), ConnMaxLifetime(5m)
- Migration 000006: indexes on teams.coach_id + 6 other columns
- Separate isTeamLoading/isMembersLoading flags in teamStore

Code quality:
- Input uses useId() for stable label association
- PlayEditorPage uses crypto.randomUUID() for element IDs
- Error states added for team/playbook delete failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(openclaw): add openclaw-operator-system namespace

Flux cannot create a HelmRelease in a namespace that doesn't exist yet.
The createNamespace flag in HelmRelease only applies after the namespace
is available for Flux to write into.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: block AI crawlers + cap pagination to stop 1244GB egress spike

GPTBot was crawling ?page=1 through ?page=532+ on every city/state page,
bypassing ISR cache and triggering 728K+ SELECT * queries against Supabase.

- Block GPTBot, ClaudeBot, ChatGPT-User, meta-externalagent, Go-http-client
  in middleware (enforced at edge, not advisory like robots.txt)
- Cap ?page= param at 100 in middleware (return 404 for absurd values)
- Replace SELECT * existence checks with COUNT(*) queries
  (hasClinicsByState/hasClinicsByCity instead of getClinicsByState/City)
- Disallow AI bots in robots.ts (were previously allowed: allow ["/"])
- Fix unused import in find-and-clean-broadcast script
